response_body_utf8: {"status":"ok","message-type":"work","message-version":"1.0.0","message":{"indexed":{"date-parts":[[2026,1,17]],"date-time":"2026-01-17T11:00:55Z","timestamp":1768647655742,"version":"3.49.0"},"reference-count":0,"publisher":"Penerbit UTM Press","issue":"9","content-domain":{"domain":[],"crossmark-restriction":false},"short-container-title":["Jurnal Teknologi"],"abstract":"<jats:p>This study was carried out to analyze the impact of four skin models and three skin characteristics on Monte Carlo simulation of light-skin diffuse reflectance spectra. The simulation was performed using graphic processing unit (GPU)-based Monte Carlo code (CUDAMCML). The computation platform was a laptop with 2.3 GHz processor (Intel Core i5-2410M) and supported by NVIDIA\u2019s Compute Unified Device Architecture (CUDA) graphic card (GeForce GT 520M). This analysis showed the importance of taking into account the depth distribution of melanin in designing a multi-layered skin model. Addition of complexity to the model caused only less than two minutes increment of computation time. Increase of melanin concentration reduced the values of diffuse reflectance over the spectrum while the profile of \u2018W\u2019 curve became less-defined. Increase of blood concentration also decreased the values of diffuse reflectance (particularly at wavelengths < 600 nm) but the profile of \u2018W\u2019 curve became more-defined. Increase of epidermal and dermal thicknesses influenced the diffuse reflectance spectra but not for subcutaneous fat thickness.\u00a0\u00a0<\/jats:p>","DOI":"10.11113\/jt.v78.7605","type":"journal-article","created":{"date-parts":[[2016,9,22]],"date-time":"2016-09-22T03:50:35Z","timestamp":1474516235000},"source":"Crossref","is-referenced-by-count":2,"title":["EFFECT OF MULTI-DESIGN SKIN MODEL AND CHARACTERISTIC ON MONTE CARLO SIMULATION OF LIGHT-SKIN DIFFUSE REFLECTANCE SPECTRA"],"prefix":"10.11113","volume":"78","author":[{"given":"Muhammad Nur Salihin","family":"Yusoff","sequence":"first","affiliation":[],"role":[{"role":"author","vocabulary":"crossref"}]},{"given":"Mohamad Suhaimi","family":"Jaafar","sequence":"additional","affiliation":[],"role":[{"role":"author","vocabulary":"crossref"}]}],"member":"4787","published-online":{"date-parts":[[2016,8,28]]},"container-title":["Jurnal Teknologi"],"original-title":[],"link":[{"URL":"https:\/\/journals.utm.my\/index.php\/jurnalteknologi\/article\/download\/7605\/5742","content-type":"application\/pdf","content-version":"vor","intended-application":"text-mining"},{"URL":"https:\/\/journals.utm.my\/index.php\/jurnalteknologi\/article\/download\/7605\/5742","content-type":"unspecified","content-version":"vor","intended-application":"similarity-checking"}],"deposited":{"date-parts":[[2020,9,23]],"date-time":"2020-09-23T02:50:13Z","timestamp":1600829413000},"score":1,"resource":{"primary":{"URL":"https:\/\/journals.utm.my\/index.php\/jurnalteknologi\/article\/view\/7605"}},"subtitle":[],"short-title":[],"issued":{"date-parts":[[2016,8,28]]},"references-count":0,"journal-issue":{"issue":"9","published-online":{"date-parts":[[2016,8,30]]}},"URL":"https:\/\/doi.org\/10.11113\/jt.v78.7605","relation":{},"ISSN":["2180-3722","0127-9696"],"issn-type":[{"value":"2180-3722","type":"electronic"},{"value":"0127-9696","type":"print"}],"subject":[],"published":{"date-parts":[[2016,8,28]]}}}
